transcript.text:
My... Mister?
[Just Mister]
Do I have to put 3?
3 of them=cockle clams [Dad Jokes]
[Really..?]
[More dad jokes]
[But with a twist]
[Culinary researcher's Cockle Clam dish]
[Pro Mukbanger Tzuyang's Cockle Clam Mukbang]
[A genocide]
[Namdang Pier, Hongsun County, South Chungcheong Province]
Hello everyone
I am here at Namdang Pier today
I came here last year around this time
There weren't any people around
This year as well

[We hope that Covid-19 will end in 2021]
I came by myself last year for the cockle clam mukbang
I brought a chef this time
Hello
I'm Chef Oh
I saw your cockle clam mukbang
You ate the whole restaurant
[Footage from Jan 13, 2020]
[I will only eat 200]
Rumor has it that he went out to catch more after your mukbang
Are you ready to cook that much?
[Let's go]
There's a lot
You've gotten prettier You think so?
You must've eaten a lot
Did I get fatter?

No, where did all that food go?
She took like 20kgs worth with shells
3 servings of ramyun noodles
And 2 more servings of regular noodles
Sir, it looks like you're reporting her
Is this a sue?
I don't have any of it prepared yet, so you crack them open on your own
Get it like this and twist
[It looks like a beak]
It looks like a bird, right?
That looks easy to do
Easy?
[Try it yourself]
[Let's eat this much]
[Harder than it seems]
I've ruined it

I thought it looked easy?
Sir, is your blood type A?
AB
[That will take all day]
[1kg of cockle clam meat] You ate 7 of these last time
Don't eat too much
Just a little bit
You will get sick after 5kgs
[Please Take Care of My Refrigerator..?]
[Steamed Cockle Clam]
[I'm hungry]
[Just a moment]
[Cockle Skewers]
[Serving for Tzuyang]
Is this your restaurant?
Wow thank you

Thank you for the food
Did you use direct fire for these?
How did you know?
Thank you Bon Appetit
[How will it taste?]
So good
It's good
Indeed
It will go well with rice
There are noodles?
Yum
It's even better
It's good
I like this better
[You're the best!]
The texture is nice and crunchy

The expensive ones have a sweet taste to it
[Mung Bean Noodles]
What kind of noodles are these? Mung bean
Hongseong beef brisket, Hongseong cockle clam And the Hongseong garlic
This is a 3-combo?
It's a script
I've figured that out (Dad joke)
[This isn't working]
There's a song that goes: A bird flies by (More dad jokes)
Do you know that song? No, what is that?
[Such great defense..]
Let's dip in for 10 seconds
Vinegar? No, 10 seconds
I think it's been 10 seconds
Here you go, Thank you
Cooking it just a little bit was the right move

It's nice and chewy
Let's cook the cockle clam
[3-combo wrap]
What was that?
I thought this would be greasy, but it's not
There are a lot of meat these days that are so flavorless
But this one is full of flavors
[3-combo wrap for the chef]
Do I need to put 3 pieces of cockle clams? (Dad joke)
[Silence]
You are going nuts for dad jokes
1 cockle clam or 3 cockle clams? (TMI: cockle clam's direct translation in Korean is "3 clams") ("3" can also mean "bird" in Korean)
1, 2, 3 3 clams = cockle clams
Are you usually like this?
My wife suffers everyday
You have a YouTube channel, right? If you guys like dad jokes..

Welcome Oh Sedeuk (His YouTube name is also a dad joke)
[Endless dad jokes]
[Starting to feel the coldness]
Oh right, this is a mukbang
I talk a lot too,
But I try to talk less in mukbangs
[Sorry]
[Practicing silence]
[What should I do..?]
[I need to talk]
[Unstable]
He's having a hard time
I'm having withdrawals
[You can relax]
[He's getting used to it]
You really don't eat the vegetables

Others will eat that first
But she won't even look at it
[Meat is the best]
[The owner comes in]
Did you eat a lot?
You ate a lot
It tastes even better this time
Since you're almost done with the food, wait here
Is he bringing us the bill?
This is for Tzuyang
If you go to Hongseong.com for our online festival
[He's advertising]
We send these out for delivery
This is 1kg of cockle clams
Also some manila clams, vegetables, and spicy sauce
You can search Hongseong Namdang Pier cockle clam festival

Think of this as your chance for a commercial
This is a well-treated cockle clam
Right in your mouth
Can I have some ramyun noodles?
Here's 2
You've become so nice after that commercial
[Cockle clam noodles]
Looks delicious
I will just take 1 bite
You won't be satisfied with 1 bite It's just too delicious
This is the best
You did a good job cooking this Yummy
[Full]
There's a reason why she's famous
[Endless mukbang]
This is what you ate today

An otter won't even eat this much
I didn't even eat that much today
I saw a couple of people around last year
But the pier is completely empty this year
Even if you can't come here physically because of Covid,
They are sending them out for delivery
So please show some interest in Hongseong's cockle clams
I've been informed that these are in season up until March
So do not miss your chance on Hongseong cockle clams
This is not a home shopping show
We ask for your interest in the Hongseong fishermen who are experiencing a difficult time during the pandemic [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
